title: Gooey Sweet Thai Dum Nam Prik
description: A festive Northern Thai dish featuring a sweet and spicy sauce with dum, sugar, and plant-based friendly ingredients, this nam prik is perfect for special occasions. It has a unique mustardy flavor and a gooey texture.
instructions: Roast the dried chilies in a 350 degree oven for 5 minutes to enhance their flavor.
Grind the roasted chilies into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat and saute the shallots and garlic until softened.
Add the lemongrass, sugar, dum, mustard, and chili powder to the pan and stir well.
Pour in the water and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season the nam prik with salt to taste.
Remove the lemongrass stalks and let the nam prik cool to room temperature.
Serve the gooey sweet Thai dum nam prik at room temperature or chilled.
